feed.title: App Store Discounts（US）
feed.subtitle: App Store Discounts - Made with love by appstore-discounts(https://github.com/appstore-discounts/appstore-discounts) feedId:49753370488353792+userId:73658201673997312 feedId:157008699750812672+userId:73658201673997312

entry.title: 🎉 Welcome to subscribe to App Store Discounts
entry.summary: Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!
entry.content:
Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!

About our RSS feed

  • Focused on delivering App Store app discount information
  • Whenever an app's price drops or in-app purchases go on sale, we will promptly send you a notification
  • Each app's discount information is presented in a separate feed
  • The RSS feed is completely open-source, allowing you to view, contribute, and add your favorite apps at any time

Find Us

App Store Discounts

Finally

If this project has been helpful to you, would you kindly give us a ⭐️

entry.title: Statistical Data Report
entry.content:
Country or Region Tracked

  1. Mainland China(CN)
  2. Hong Kong, China(HK)
  3. Macao, China(MO)
  4. Taiwan, China(TW)
  5. United States(US)
  6. Türkiye(TR)
  7. Portugal(PT)

Statistics of the Number of App Tracked

Category Total Apps Artificially Added Automatically Added Prohibit Push
All 1943 201 1742 83
US 1799 176 1623 66

Ranking of App Discounts This Month(US)

Since it supports applications that automatically add tracking based on paid application rankings, most applications are now automatically added, and the quality of the application is unknown and uncontrollable. The current ranking will be used as a reference for subsequent disabling push.

entry.title: Luck be a Landlord
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$4.99 → $3.99 [$2.49 ~ $4.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$3.99

Application Description

Defeat your landlord in this slot machine roguelike deckbuilder! Your landlord is knocking on your door. You have one coin left to your name. You insert the coin into your slot machine...and...JACKPOT! Luck be a Landlord, tonight! Luck be a Landlord is a roguelike deckbuilder about using a slot machine to earn rent money and defeat capitalism. This game does not contain any real-world currency gambling or microtransactions. Features: 152 Symbols 227 Items 186 Achievements 20 Apartment Floors

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: 宗师-武林风云传
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$0.99 → Free [Free ~ $0.99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

In-App Purchases

  • 3880元宝：$59.99
  • 月卡VIP：$3.99
  • 880元宝：$12.99
  • 终身卡VIP：$59.99
  • 1680元宝：$24.99
  • 250元宝：$3.99
  • 2980元宝：$39.99
  • 60元宝：$0.99
  • 终身VIP：$59.99
  • 年卡VIP：$34.99

Application Description

一、游戏背景 昔日碌碌无为，消磨光阴。后受教于南贤智者，立志成为武林盟主，为此踏上江湖征程。 二、游戏特色 -单机、联网均可玩的RPG。 -武侠剧情，环环相扣。 -江湖友人，相伴同行。 -武林之行，可正可邪。 -江湖问道，高人指点。 -侠客排行，不再孤单。 -江湖奇遇，武学进阶。 -江湖秘境，暗藏珍宝。 -夺得神杖，无限重玩。 -侠客挂机，快速升级。 -高度自由的世界大地图，近百座情景建筑。 -数百种武功可学，绝艺不限于耍刀、御剑与拳掌。

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Sands of Salzaar
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$4.99 → $3.99 [$3.99 ~ $4.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$3.99

In-App Purchases

  • DLC - The Tournament：$1.99
  • DLC - The Ember Saga：$1.99
  • DLC - Land of the Eclipse：$1.99

Application Description

This is a fantastical tale of an exotic land. The Old Empire has fallen, leaving rival tribes to fight for control of the great desert. Little do they know of the seeds of darkness which grow in the shadows with each passing day... Sands of Salzaar is an open-world strategy-action RPG set across a sprawling desert. Build up and manage your forces from a single unit to a mighty army, then lead them into massive battles against your foes. How you progress is up to you: customize your hero with a wide variety of skills and talents, choose which factions to side with, and plan your strategies carefully to establish yourself as whoever you aspire to be - a lone wolf, a wealthy trader, a city lord, or a war schemer.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Otaku's Adventure
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$2.99 → $1.99 [$1.99 ~ $2.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$1.99

Application Description

Otaku’s Adventure is a unique anime-style AVG that tells the story of an Otaku who has been single since birth and craves to be loved. After the romantic encounter with three charming girls, your life will take an unexpected turn: to go on a run-away adventure with Waifu, an outer-space journey with Gohard, or an exploration in a fantasy world with (´･ω･`). - Kick start your thrilling and romantic adventure and release your Otaku energy! - Unlock 35+ endings following three different routes - Use your wit to solve the ingenious puzzles and beat a collection of funny mini-games ranging from shooting games to turn-based RPG combat - Enjoy the brand new DLC free of charge and uncover the untold story of Waifu - Get yourself immersed in the new voice-acting for Waifu and (´･ω･`) along with the original Cantonese voice-acting for Gohard - Test your Otaku-ness level by discovering the anime and game references! _________________________ Follow us on Twitter: @XD_En_Official Contact: indie@xd.com

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Rusty Lake Hotel
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$1.99 → $0.99 [$0.99 ~ $1.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$0.99

Application Description

Welcome our guests to the Rusty Lake Hotel and make sure they will have a pleasant stay. There will be 5 dinners this week. Make sure every dinner is worth dying for. Rusty Lake Hotel is a mysterious point-and-click adventure by the creators of the Rusty Lake & Cube Escape series. Features: - Pick-up-and-play: easy to start, but it will be hard to put down - Tons of puzzles: a total of 6 rooms full of unique and various brain teasers - Thrilling and engaging story: there will be 5 dinners with intriguing guests and staff - Full of suspense and atmosphere: Rusty Lake Hotel is a surreal place, where anything can happen… - Impressive soundtrack: every room has its own designed theme song - Achievements: an all-time gallery you've never seen before We will unfold the mysteries of Rusty Lake one step at a time, follow us @rustylakecom.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Rusty Lake Paradise
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$2.99 → $0.99 [$0.99 ~ $2.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$0.99

Application Description

Jakob, the oldest son of the Eilander family, is returning to Paradise island after his mother passed away. Since her mysterious death, the island seems to be cursed by the ten plagues. Find the mother's hidden memories and partake in strange family rituals in order to stop the plagues. Rusty Lake Paradise is the third premium point-and-click adventure by Rusty Lake, the creators of the Cube Escape series, Rusty Lake Hotel & Rusty Lake: Roots. Key features: - Pick-up-and-play: Easy to start but hard to put down - Unique storyline: The first adventure game based around the ten plagues of Egypt - An unforgettable puzzle experience Each plague brings its own atmosphere, suspense and a variety of Rusty Lake brain teasers - Atmospheric graphics The pastel background paintings are handmade by Dutch painter Johan Scherft -Immersive Soundtrack: Each plague has its own theme song and variations - Achievements The island has more secrets to unravel We will unfold the Rusty Lake story one step at a time. So check RustyLake.com every day for new content and follow us: @rustylakecom.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Rusty Lake: Roots
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$2.99 → $0.99 [$0.99 ~ $2.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$0.99

Application Description

James Vanderboom's life drastically changes when he plants a special seed in the garden of the house he has inherited. Expand your bloodline by unlocking portraits in the tree of life. Rusty Lake: Roots is the second premium point-and-click adventure by Rusty Lake, the creators of the Cube Escape series and Rusty Lake Hotel. Features: - Pick-up-and-play: Easy to start but hard to put down. - Unique storyline: Experience the beginning and end of characters' lives and build your own family tree. - More than 33 levels: The biggest Rusty Lake game so far is filled with puzzles - Full of suspense and atmosphere: Switching from calm to very dark moments - Immersive soundtrack: Each level has its own theme song and variations - Achievements: The tree has more secrets to unravel Tap on the arrows, drag or swipe to navigate around the environment. Some objects you can drag. Interact with people and objects by tapping. Select found items in your inventory and tap somewhere on screen to use them. We will unfold the Rusty Lake story one step at a time. So check RustyLake.com every day for new content and follow us: @rustylakecom.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: The Past Within
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$2.99 → $0.99 [$0.99 ~ $2.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$0.99

Application Description

Note: The Past Within is a co-op only game. Both players need to own a copy of the game on their own device (mobile, tablet or computer), as well as a way to communicate with each other. Play together with a friend or find a partner on our official Discord server! The past and future cannot be explored alone! Team up with a friend and piece together the mysteries surrounding Albert Vanderboom. Communicate what you see around you to help one another solve various puzzles and explore the worlds from different perspectives! The Past Within is the first co-op only point-and-click adventure set in the mysterious world of Rusty Lake. Features: ▪ A co-op experience Play together with a friend, one in The Past, the other in The Future. Work together to solve the puzzles and help Rose set her father’s plan in motion! ▪ Two worlds - Two perspectives Both players will experience their environments in two different dimensions: 2D as well as in 3D - a first-time experience in the Rusty Lake universe! ▪ Cross-platform As long as you can communicate with each other, you and your partner of choice can each play The Past Within on your preferred platform: Mac, PC and Nintendo Switch! ▪ Playtime & Replayability The game contains 2 chapters and has an average play-time of 2 hours. For the full experience, we recommend replaying the game from the other perspective. Plus you can use our replayability feature for a fresh start with new solutions to all puzzles.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Underground Blossom
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$2.99 → $0.99 [$0.99 ~ $2.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$0.99

Application Description

Descend into the Rusty Lake Underground and travel through the life and memories of Laura Vanderboom! Travel from station to station, each metro stop symbolising a piece of Laura's past and future. Solve various puzzles, find the correct metro to board and uncover one of Laura’s timelines, while simultaneously helping her make sense of her life and escape the corruption of her mind! Underground Blossom is a new point-and-click adventure developed by the creators of the Cube Escape & Rusty Lake series. Features: ▪ A new experience in a familiar setting Enjoy a classic Rusty Lake point-and-click puzzle adventure with a gripping story full of mysteries and, of course, puzzles. ▪ Expect to make several stops Travel to 7 unique metro stations, each station a representation of Laura Vanderboom’s life, memories and potential future. The estimated travel time is 2 hours. ▪ You know what to do Unravel the potential secrets hidden in each metro station, earn achievements and who knows what else you might stumble upon! ▪ Don’t forget your headphones At each metro stop you will be greeted by an atmospheric soundtrack by Victor Butzelaar, including a cello performance by Sebastiaan van Halsema!

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Moncage
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$4.99 → $3.99 [$3.99 ~ $4.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$3.99

Application Description

Moncage is a stunning vignette puzzle adventure developed by Optillusion. The game takes place inside a mysterious cube, with each side of the cube housing a unique world: be it an old factory, a light tower, an amusement park, or a church, etc. At first sight, they may seem random and unrelated, but upon closer look, you will become mesmerized by the subtle and intricate ways of how these worlds connect… 【Solve Puzzles with Mind-Boggling Optical Illusions】 Use your imagination and spare no brain cells to find the connection and pinpoint every possible interaction between different sides of the cube, then watch as the magic unfold in front of you. 【Collect All Photos to Unveil the Story】 Behind the puzzles, there lies a story with a surprising twist for the player to uncover. Collect the photos from obscure corners and angles to reveal the underlying story, one photo at a time. 【Get Unstuck with Thoughtful Hints】 There is a multitude of guidance systems to help prevent players from getting stuck. Focus can be activated to highlight the key items to the solution, while hint texts are available to provide further clarity. And, if all else fails, video walkthroughs can be unlocked as the ultimate safety plan. 【Prove Your Puzzle-Solving Skills with Medals】 There are a total of 15 achievements in the game, each corresponding with a Medal that has been crafted with a uniquely stunning design. A complete collection of the 15 Medals could be the perfect evidence to attest to your master puzzle-solving skills~ 【Connect with us:】 Twitter: @MoncageTheGame Email: moncagethegame@gmail.com Discord: https://discord.com/invite/TEVX2uPEsj

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Tokyo Dispatcher!
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$1.99 → $0.99 [$0.29 ~ $1.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$0.99

Application Description

Run Japan's trains! No railroad knowledge is required to play "Tokyo Dispatcher!". This game is a brain game with simple rules but requires a lot of brain power. Customers are waiting at the station for the trains to arrive to take them to their destinations. Start the trains and transport your customers. You will earn money for every passenger who boards a train. Adjust the interval between runs and the number of cars to achieve the highest revenue. Departing trains costs money. If you send out too many trains and the boarding rate drops, you will lose your revenue. The operation method is very easy and the rules are simple. All you have to do is adjust the number of train cars and make the trains depart at the best time. As the game progresses, express fares will also appear. No technical knowledge is required at all. Both people who like trains and people who like games can quickly understand and enjoy the game. There are no in-app purchases. There are no ads. Please concentrate on the game. Share your operating results on social media.

entry.title: Tokyo Dispatcher! 2
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$1.99 → $0.99 [$0.29 ~ $2.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$0.99

Application Description

Dispatch Japanese trains! ・Simple brain game "Train Dispatcher!2" is a brain game with simple rules. No expertise required. Train fans, game fans, everyone can enjoy it. ・To everyone who will become a train dispatcher In the morning in Japan, customers are waiting for the arrival of the train to go to work. Let's start the train and transport the customers. ・Goal of the game Japanese railway companies are for-profit organizations. Let's aim for high operating profit! ・How to make profit Fare revenue - Departure cost = Operating profit. Fare revenue is generated when passengers board at a station. Example) If two passengers board a train at a station with a fare of 20, the company receives 40. Departure costs are charged according to the number of cars when the train departs. Example) 30 for a 2-car train, 40 for a 4-car train, and 70 for a 10-car train. One person can ride in one car. Fare revenue is generated when customers board the train. Adjust the driving schedule and the number of vehicles to aim for the highest profit. Departure costs. If you run too many trains and the occupancy rate drops, you'll lose revenue. ・How to operate The game is very easy to operate and the rules are simple. All you have to do is adjust the number of train cars and make the trains depart at the best time. As the game progresses, various variations such as express trains and transfer stations will appear. ・Volume Enjoy over 50 routes. Please experience the wide variety of transportation strategies of Japanese railway companies. No ads, no charges. ・No ads, no billing Please concentrate on the game. Children can also enjoy the game. Share your results on Social Media. ・Train lines you can play with JR East Japan JR Tokai JR West Japan JR Kyushu Tobu Tokyu Seibu Keio Keikyu Keihan Hankyu Hanshin Kintetsu Meitetsu Odakyu Nankai Seitetsu Sotetsu Keisei Tokyo Metro Osaka Metro Toei Subway Tsukuba Express ・Capacity is about 130MB The storage burden is also small. There is no heavy processing at all.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Eco Power Towns
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$1.99 → $0.99 [$0.99 ~ $1.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$0.99

Application Description

Can you power a tiny town.. sustainably? Eco Power Towns is a thoughtful strategy puzzle where every placement matters. Generate clean energy using solar, wind, tidal and biomass technologies; all while managing your limited resources. Upgrade, research, and optimize your layout to reach the energy goal and light up all the cozy homes. What to expect? - Contains no text at all: the entire game is icon-driven and intuitive. - Build solar panels, windmills, biomass plants, tidal generators and more. - Hints are available in case you get stuck on a level. - Reach energy goals before you run out of resources - Light up cozy houses across forests, swamps, hills, and rocky terrain - Unlock research upgrades to improve your production efficiency - Explore handcrafted levels of increasing challenge - Solve satisfying puzzles that reward careful planning - Enjoy peaceful lo-fi beat vibes and a clean, minimalist art style - A paid game: no ads, no tracking, no distractions, no data collected - Haptic Feedback - Game Center & Achievements I'm a solo game developer who made this game with a lot of care and love. I hope Eco Power Towns brings you a little joy, a little challenge, and a lot of cozy energy.

entry.title: DayCircle - Day counter
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$1.99 → Free [Free ~ $1.99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

Application Description

Birthday, anniversaries, moving, First day of ... How to remember them all? DDay, simply marked down the day Celebrate each in full color.

Application Screenshot

iPhone
